translation.en: I like learning English, besides I also learn French.

content.sentence: Tôi thích học tiếng Anh, ___ tôi cũng học tiếng Pháp.

notes_md:
**Ngoài ra** means “in addition” or “besides that.” It adds extra information after you’ve already said something.

It’s a linking phrase, usually placed at the beginning of a sentence, followed by a comma. It connects two related ideas, with the second idea being extra or supplementary.


Close synonyms: **thêm vào đó**, **bên cạnh đó** (a bit more formal, but similar meaning).
exampleSentencesTranslated: In addition, I also like to play football on weekends.
She finished her homework, in addition helped me cook.
In addition, I will bring an umbrella if it rains today.

example.vi: Ngoài ra, tôi còn thích đọc sách vào cuối tuần.
example.en: Besides, I also like to read books on weekends.

definitions.vi: Từ dùng để bổ sung thêm thông tin hoặc ý kiến ngoài những điều đã nêu trước đó.
definitions.en: A phrase used to add additional information or opinions apart from what has already been mentioned.

translation.en: I like this dish, besides I also like another dish.

content.sentence: Tôi thích món này, ___ tôi cũng thích món khác.

exampleSentences: Ngoài ra, anh còn thích chơi bóng đá vào cuối tuần.
Chị đã hoàn thành bài tập, ngoài ra còn giúp em nấu ăn.
Ngoài ra, em sẽ mang theo ô nếu trời mưa hôm nay.
notes:
Ngoài ra means “in addition” or “besides that.” It adds extra information after you’ve already said something.

It’s a linking phrase, usually placed at the beginning of a sentence, followed by a comma. It connects two related ideas, with the second idea being extra or supplementary.

Close synonyms: thêm vào đó, bên cạnh đó (a bit more formal, but similar meaning).
